title: Total supplement deductions 2021
description: Complete the total supplement deductions section of your supplementary tax return.
keywords: TaxPack, TaxPack supplement, deductions, tax return, 2021, supplement deductions, paper tax return, paper form, paper return, paper lodgement

content_blocks.text: Did you claim any deductions at items D11 to D15?
Add up all the deduction amounts in the right-hand column of items D11 to D15 on your tax return.
Write the total from step 1 at Total supplement deductions on page 15 of your tax return.
Transfer the amount you wrote at Total supplement deductions to D on page 4 of your tax return.
Go to Total deductions 2021 ; then work through the Losses section.

items: Go to question T3 Superannuation contributions on behalf of your spouse 2021 .
Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2021 .
Go back to question D15 Other deductions – not claimable at items D1 to D14 or elsewhere on your tax return 2021 .

content_text:
Did you claim any deductions at items D11 to D15?
No | Go to step 4 .
Yes | Go to step 1.
## Step 1
Add up all the deduction amounts in the right-hand column of items D11 to D15 on your tax return.
## Step 2
Write the total from step 1 at Total supplement deductions on page 15 of your tax return.
## Step 3
Transfer the amount you wrote at Total supplement deductions to D on page 4 of your tax return.
## Step 4
Go to Total deductions 2021 ; then work through the Losses section.
## Where to go next
- Go to question T3 Superannuation contributions on behalf of your spouse 2021 .
- Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2021 .
- Go back to question D15 Other deductions – not claimable at items D1 to D14 or elsewhere on your tax return 2021 .
